description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting a youthful male figure with wavy hair and finely detailed facial features. The bust is adorned with a draped garment and a medallion featuring a relief portrait, suggesting a historical or mythological subject. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular plinth, which bears an inscription that appears to read 'ALEXANDER' and a date, though the full text is partially obscured. The surface of the sculpture is textured, with visible chisel marks and a weathered patina, giving it an aged stone appearance. The back of the bust is less detailed, focusing on the hair and shoulders, while the sides reveal the depth and three-dimensionality of the carving. The overall coloration is a mix of gray and off-white tones, typical of marble or stone statuary.
description: A detailed classical bust of a youthful male with wavy hair, draped clothing, and a medallion, mounted on a rectangular plinth with an inscription.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the face, detailed hair, draped garment, medallion, and the inscribed plinth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the bust, and the layered hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the less detailed surface of the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the draped garment, and the three-dimensional form of the bust.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure, possibly Alexander the Great
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
